news.t: Pacer ETFs Expands Free Cash Flow Aristocrats Lineup with Launch of Mid-Cap and Small-Cap Quality Strategies: MCOW and SCOW

holdings.infoBox: MCOW is an equity ETF with a total of 82 individual holdings. The top holdings are Everpure stock at 4.67%, Sterling Infrastructure at 4.34%, Lattice Semiconductor at 4.20%, Rambus at 3.34%, and DocuSign at 2.92%.

overview.description: The Pacer S&P MidCap 400 Quality FCF Aristocrats ETF (MCOW) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in mid cap equity. The fund is passively managed, seeking to provide exposure to mid-sized companies in the US with consistent positive cash flow-based financial strength. MCOW was launched on Aug 27, 2025 and is issued by Pacer.
infoTable: S&P MidCap 400 Quality FCF Aristocrats Index

data.title: Pacer ETFs Expands Free Cash Flow Aristocrats Lineup with Launch of Mid-Cap and Small-Cap Quality Strategies: MCOW and SCOW
data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pacer ETFs Expands Free Cash Flow Aristocrats Lineup with Launch of Mid-Cap and Small-Cap Quality Strategies: MCOW and SCOW.
